name: Fabfood Raspberries and Cream Snowflake Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow both crust pouches to stand at room temperature for 15 to 20 minutes.
2. Heat oven to 450 degrees F (232 degrees C).
3. Prepare one crust according to package directions using a 9-inch pie pan. Bake at 450 degrees F (232 degrees C) for 9 to 11 minutes or until lightly browned; cool.
4. To make snowflake crust, unfold the remaining crust onto an ungreased cookie sheet. Remove plastic sheets.
5. Cut the crust into a 7 1/2-inch diameter circle and discard scraps. Refold the circle into fourths on the cookie sheet.
6. Using a knife, cut designs from the folded and curved edges; discard scraps. Unfold.
7. Bake at 450 degrees F (232 degrees C) for 6 to 8 minutes or until lightly browned; cool completely.
8. Reserve half of the raspberry filling. Spoon the remaining filling into the cooled baked shell in the pan.
9. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until light and fluffy. Add milk; blend well. Add lemon juice and almond extract; stir until thickened.
10. Spoon over the raspberry filling in the crust. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
11. Spoon the reserved raspberry filling around the edge of the pie. Place the snowflake crust on top. Refrigerate several hours.
12. Just before serving, sprinkle with powdered sugar. Store in the refrigerator.
